strengths: The chapter opens with public pressure still active, preventing the old-case investigation from feeling detached from the release-event mainline.
Lin Zhao's choice to verify the source chain before believing the material gives him strong agency and emotional restraint.
The old case becomes a concrete commercial structure: read-only access, retrospective confirmation, responsibility wording, and handler overlap.
The ending points cleanly to chapter 9's risk-control memo without over-solving the long arc.
issues: The chapter is document-heavy, so future revisions should keep dialogue pressure sharp.
Song Qiming's reveal must remain a lead; overstating it would collapse the long arc too early.
revision_priorities: Keep the source-chain verification in the final accepted draft.
Keep the system boundary explicit: Niguang can identify verifiable contradictions but cannot name the mastermind.
Use the QY-17 memo as chapter 9's next verification object.
human_approval_needed: Approve Qin Muyu's old-case material source path.
Approve Song Qiming and project library QY-17 as chapter 9 hooks.
Approve keeping He Sheng and Obsidian as suspicious risk leads only.
